description: Letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Mentioning a letter 'to the cook' (al-ṭabbākh); that the sender advanced 2 dinars to someone; the [sec]retary(?) of Muʾayyad al-Mulk came and signed something; a press; exerting effort in something; a document pertaining toa. sale; Abū l-Ḥasan; and greetings to at least two women at the end. Concludes with a citation of Numbers 25:13. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
